display_name: 桃花源接入互联网 Cast

en.name: Village Chief Tao
en.summary: Village head trying to protect an old way of life from new signal.

en.name: A-Cheng
en.summary: Young villager curious about the outside world and its costs.

en.name: A-Li
en.summary: Young villager seeing both opportunity and trouble in going online.

en.name: Xiaolan the Vlogger
en.summary: Short-video creator who finds the village before the village finds a policy.

en.name: Zhou Yue
en.summary: Tourism manager turning discovery into a product plan.

en.name: Professor Meng
en.summary: Folklore scholar asking what should stay undocumented.

en.name: Xu Ning
en.summary: Local official trying to make the situation legible to the state.

en.name: Uncle Tao
en.summary: Conservative elder who thinks attention is already a kind of damage.

en.name: A-Xiu
en.summary: Weaver and dyer worried that craft will become content.

en.name: A-Yuan
en.summary: Returnee caught between protecting the village and helping it earn money.

en.name: Lin Chuan
en.summary: Outside tourist whose curiosity keeps creating obligations.

en.name: Ada from Platform Ops
en.summary: Platform contact trying to turn messy attention into policy and metrics.
